description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The front facade features a combination of large windows, vertical blue accent panels, and a recessed entryway. The house includes an outdoor swimming pool on the upper level, adjacent to a spacious terrace with outdoor seating and dining areas. The rear and side elevations display a mix of solid white walls and horizontal window bands, with a large garage door visible on one side. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen spaces, as well as a prominent bookshelf and bedroom area. The exterior is primarily finished in white and gray, with touches of blue and wood tones for contrast.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and an upper-level pool and terrace. The design features clean lines, white and gray finishes, and open-plan interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, vertical blue accent panels, large windows, and a glimpse of the upper-level pool and terrace.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage door, horizontal window bands, and the full length of the pool and terrace area.
description_view_2: Rear view with mostly solid white wall, minimal window openings, and the pool edge visible on the upper level.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the terrace, pool, and a mostly blank wall with a single horizontal accent.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a simple door, vertical blue accent panels, and no porch or overhang
